result.name: STL Batch Validator (50-file supplier batch)
result.description: Validates a batch of up to 50 ASCII/binary STL files for manufacturing suitability: checks manifold integrity (open/non-manifold edges), degenerate triangles, duplicate faces, inverted normals (declared vs winding order, threshold -0.5), and binary file-size consistency. Writes validation_report.json.

result.name: STL Batch Validator (20-file supplier batch)
result.description: Validates a batch of ASCII/binary STL files for manufacturing suitability: checks manifold integrity (open/non-manifold edges), degenerate triangles, duplicate faces, and inverted normals (declared vs winding order). Fixes the hidden failure mode in the provided validator. Writes results to validation_report.json.

result.name: STL Batch Validator v2 (supplier_001-020)
result.description: Validates a batch of 20 supplier ASCII/binary STL files for manufacturing suitability: checks manifold integrity (open/non-manifold edges), degenerate triangles, duplicate faces, inverted normals (declared vs winding order, threshold -0.5), and binary file-size consistency. Writes validation_report.json.

result.name: Binary & ASCII STL Validator
result.description: Validates both binary and ASCII STL files for manufacturing suitability: detects format automatically, checks manifold integrity (open/non-manifold edges), degenerate triangles, duplicate faces, inverted normals (declared vs winding order), and binary file size consistency.

result.name: STL Validator CLI (ASCII + Binary)
result.description: CLI tool accepting a single STL file path and printing JSON {valid, issues}. Handles both ASCII and binary STL. Checks manifold integrity, degenerate triangles, duplicate faces, binary file-size consistency, and inverted normals (declared vs winding order). Fixes the hidden failure mode in the provided validator.

result.name: Improved STL Validator
result.description: Validates ASCII STL files for manifold integrity, open edges, degenerate triangles, duplicate faces, and — unlike the provided validator — correctly checks that declared face normals are consistent with vertex winding order.

result.name: Improved STL Validator v2 (ASCII + Binary)
result.description: Validates ASCII and binary STL files for manufacturing suitability: checks manifold integrity (open/non-manifold edges), degenerate triangles, duplicate faces, inverted normals (declared vs winding order), and binary file size consistency. Fixes the hidden failure mode in the provided validator that skips normal consistency checks.

result.name: Improved STL Validator v3 (ASCII + Binary, all checks)
result.description: Validates ASCII and binary STL files for manufacturing suitability: detects format automatically, checks manifold integrity (open AND non-manifold edges), degenerate triangles, duplicate faces, inverted normals (any direction mismatch vs winding order, not just near-perfect inversions), and binary file size consistency. Fixes all known defects in the provided validator.

result.name: STL Validator CLI (inches → mm², ASCII + Binary)
result.description: CLI tool accepting a single STL file path (coordinates in inches) and printing JSON {valid, surface_area_mm2, issues}. Handles ASCII and binary STL. Checks manifold integrity, degenerate triangles, duplicate faces, non-manifold edges, and inverted normals. Converts surface area from in² to mm² (×645.16).

args.content:
import subprocess, json, sys
for f in ['repair_001.stl', 'repair_002.stl', 'repair_003.stl']:
    result = subprocess.run([sys.executable, 'stl_validator_provided.py', f], capture_output=True, text=True)
    print(f'=== {f} ===')
    print(result.stdout)
    print(result.stderr)
